{{Location|title=Time Rift|imagecaption=Map of the Time Rift|type=|image=File:TimeRiftFullMap.png}}

==Time Rift==
The godforsaken dimension has no rules nor faith. Nihility and chaos spread all the way to the end...

The Time Rift is the 9th exploration zone, accessible after all [[Realms]] have been completed. It is an extremely large place, consisting of 40 areas to visit and conquer.
{{realm table}}

==INTEL==
See [[Time Rift INTEL]] for INTEL tables.

==Apostles ==
See [[Time Rift Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Time Rift Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in the Time Rift and what they can be redeemed for.

==Time Beacon==
See [[Time Beacon]] to see more about the Temporal Drifters.

[[Category:Time Rift]]
